steps.title: Use similar triangles
steps.content: The marked angles and vertical angles make triangles $WQX$ and $YQZ$ similar.

steps.title: Set corresponding sides
steps.content:
Corresponding side ratios are equal:
$$
\frac{WQ}{YQ}=\frac{WX}{YZ}
$$
Substitute the given lengths:
$$
\frac{90}{27}=\frac{60}{YZ}
$$

steps.title: Solve for the side
steps.content: Cross multiply: $$ 90(YZ)=27(60)=1{,}620 $$ $$ YZ=18 $$ The answer is A.
